{{Infobox character
| name = Endross Traveler
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Endross Traveler]] is a traveler [[Leah]] was thinking of.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cormac]] is an [[Endross Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Endross Traveler]] can control an [[Endross Gate]] without it exploding.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A single [[Endross Traveler]] in loose-fitting white clothes emerged from the [[Endross Gate]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
